tagline: Soft wash, high-pressure restoration, and a clean that lasts. Locally trusted across Stockbridge and Henry County.
rating_note: 46 Nextdoor recommendations (no numeric star rating published; BBB unrated)
services_intro: From gentle soft washing that protects your siding to high-pressure concrete restoration, we match the right method to every surface — no damage, no shortcuts.

services.title: House & Soft Washing
services.desc: Gentle, low-pressure exterior cleaning that lifts mildew, algae, and grime from siding, stucco, and brick without damage.

services.title: Driveway & Patio Cleaning
services.desc: High-pressure concrete restoration for driveways, sidewalks, pool decks, and patios — back to like-new.

services.title: Gutter Cleaning & Commercial Fronts
services.desc: Residential gutter clear-outs plus storefront and office-front pressure cleaning for sharp curb appeal.

reviews_note: No verbatim customer testimonials are published or verifiable. Site displays only the verified 46 Nextdoor recommendation count — no invented quotes.
about_paragraph: Wilson & Co. Pressure Washing is a locally owned exterior-cleaning company serving Stockbridge and the surrounding Henry County area. We choose the right pressure for every surface — soft washing for delicate siding and brick, full-pressure restoration for concrete — so your home gets clean without getting damaged. Earned through word of mouth, with 46 recommendations from neighbors on Nextdoor.
